hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$dir=Get-Item -LiteralPath (Get-Location).ProviderPath; while($null -ne $dir -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $dir.FullName "PERLA1/tools/perla_codex_workflow_check.ps1"))){$dir=$dir.Parent}; if($null -eq $dir){Write-Error "PERLA1 workflow check not found"; exit 2}; & (Join-Path $dir.FullName "PERLA1/tools/perla_codex_workflow_check.ps1") -Mode StopHook -Json'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$dir=Get-Item -LiteralPath (Get-Location).ProviderPath; while($null -ne $dir -and -not (Test-Path (Join-Path $dir.FullName "PERLA1/tools/perla_codex_workflow_check.ps1"))){$dir=$dir.Parent}; if($null -eq $dir){Write-Error "PERLA1 workflow check not found"; exit 2}; & (Join-Path $dir.FullName "PERLA1/tools/perla_codex_workflow_check.ps1") -Mode StopHook -Json'
